answer: We support English and Malayalam. Reply in the same language as your message.

answer: Free delivery on all 200g+ packs and on ALL combo orders. ₹40 delivery charge applies to 100g individual packs only.

answer: Yes it's first-quality Idukki black pepper — washed cleaned and graded. No stones no dust. Pure Idukki produce. 🌿
